Defines code style rules for the JerryScript project.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines a set of coding style rules for a software project. Each rule, prefixed with `jerry_`, specifies a particular style guideline that the code must follow. These rules cover various aspects of code formatting, such as the use of curly braces, indentation, line length, spacing around parentheses, and the prohibition of tabs and trailing spaces.
